pi_items.source: Setup script (setup_libreoffice_base.sh line 65) copies from /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/chinook.odb to /home/ga/chinook.odb
Task requirement specification, not a data property

Confirmed via official Chinook database schema at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. Track table exists with 9 columns: TrackId, Name, AlbumId, MediaTypeId, GenreId, Composer, Milliseconds, Bytes, UnitPrice
Official Chinook schema defines TrackId as INTEGER NOT NULL primary key
Official Chinook schema defines UnitPrice as NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL
Official Chinook schema specifies NUMERIC(10,2) - 10 total digits with 2 decimal places
Official Chinook schema defines Composer as NVARCHAR(220)

pi_items.key: Composer max length in database schema
pi_items.source: Official Chinook schema specifies Composer as NVARCHAR(220). See https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cwoodruff/ChinookDatabase/master/Scripts/Chinook_Sqlite.sql

pi_items.verified_value: Official Chinook database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database by lerocha

pi_items.source: Official Chinook schema: TrackId, Name, AlbumId, MediaTypeId, GenreId, Composer, Milliseconds, Bytes, UnitPrice
Form-level constraint requirement, not verifiable from database schema alone. Makes sense as TrackId is primary key.
Form-level formatting requirement. UnitPrice is NUMERIC(10,2) in database, appropriate for currency display with $ symbol.
Database schema allows NVARCHAR(220), but task requires setting form constraint to 100 characters max

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly-available sample database hosted on GitHub (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) representing a digital media store. The database is downloaded during environment setup and copied to /home/ga/chinook.odb. The Track table contains 9 columns including TrackId (INTEGER, primary key), Name, AlbumId, MediaTypeId, GenreId, Composer (NVARCHAR(220)), Milliseconds, Bytes, and UnitPrice (NUMERIC(10,2)). The task requires creating a form that constrains Composer to a maximum of 100 characters, despite the database schema allowing 220 characters. UnitPrice's 2 decimal places are consistent with currency formatting. The form should include all Track table fields.
